suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update VAL-FLOW-038 wording to align with the accepted setup-layer approach (AuthServerError and AuthUnreachable both map to identical Pending-unreachable UX), or explicitly require uploader-level reclassification if that is still the intended contract.
